Video.summary: From the love he has for his siblings, to battling on the pitch with Perisic during his time at PSV, Denzel Dumfries shares all this and more in the fourth episode of Careers

Video.summary: Every goal is an emotion, an explosion of Nerazzurri pride. A collection that tells the story of those who have made their mark wearing the Inter jersey. A journey through nets, passion, and belonging.
